description.id: Jeep private untuk sunrise, Lautan Pasir, dan area kawah dengan pickup fleksibel dari Malang atau Surabaya.
description.cn: 私人吉普车日出行程，包含沙海和火山口区域，可从 Malang 或 Surabaya 灵活接送。
description.us: Private jeep for sunrise, the Sea of Sand, and crater area with flexible pickup from Malang or Surabaya.

pickupDetails.id: Pickup utama dari hotel Malang, Bandara Juanda Surabaya, Stasiun Surabaya, atau titik kota yang disepakati.
pickupDetails.cn: 主要接送点包括 Malang 酒店、Surabaya Juanda 机场、Surabaya 火车站或约定市区地点。
pickupDetails.us: Main pickup from Malang hotels, Surabaya Juanda Airport, Surabaya train station, or an agreed city point.

pickupDetails.id: Jam pickup final mengikuti lokasi menginap, kondisi jalan, dan target viewpoint sunrise.
pickupDetails.cn: 最终接送时间会根据住宿位置、路况和日出观景点目标确认。
pickupDetails.us: Final pickup time depends on stay location, road conditions, and the target sunrise viewpoint.

pickupDetails.id: Drop-off kembali ke kota pickup atau titik lain yang masih searah, dikonfirmasi sebelum berangkat.
pickupDetails.cn: 可送回接送城市或顺路地点，出发前确认。
pickupDetails.us: Drop-off returns to the pickup city or another aligned point, confirmed before departure.

goodToKnow.id: Suhu dini hari di viewpoint bisa dingin; bawa jaket, kaus kaki, dan sepatu yang nyaman.
goodToKnow.cn: 日出观景点凌晨较冷；建议带外套、袜子和舒适鞋子。
goodToKnow.us: Early morning at the viewpoint can be cold; bring a jacket, socks, and comfortable shoes.

goodToKnow.id: Akses kawah membutuhkan jalan kaki dan tangga; traveler bisa menunggu di area jeep bila tidak ingin naik.
goodToKnow.cn: 火山口区域需要步行和爬楼梯；不想上去的旅客可在吉普车区域等待。
goodToKnow.us: Crater access requires walking and stairs; travelers can wait near the jeep area if they prefer not to climb.

goodToKnow.id: View sunrise bergantung cuaca dan kabut, jadi tim akan memilih viewpoint yang paling masuk akal saat hari H.
goodToKnow.cn: 日出视野取决于天气和雾况，团队会在当天选择最合适的观景点。
goodToKnow.us: Sunrise visibility depends on weather and fog, so the team chooses the most practical viewpoint on the travel day.

goodToKnow.id: Tiket masuk biasanya dibayar terpisah agar harga bisa mengikuti status weekday, weekend, lokal, atau internasional.
goodToKnow.cn: 门票通常单独支付，以便根据平日、周末、本地或国际旅客身份调整。
goodToKnow.us: Entrance tickets are usually paid separately so pricing can follow weekday, weekend, local, or international status.

cancellation.id: Bisa batal gratis sampai 24 jam sebelum pickup setelah jadwal final dikonfirmasi. Perubahan karena cuaca atau regulasi lokal akan dibicarakan lewat WhatsApp.
cancellation.cn: 最终行程确认后，接送前24小时以前可免费取消。因天气或当地规定产生的调整将通过 WhatsApp 沟通。
cancellation.us: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before pickup after the final schedule is confirmed. Weather or local-regulation changes are discussed via WhatsApp.

confirmation.id: Tim mengonfirmasi driver, jeep, titik pickup, estimasi tiket, dan harga final sebelum pembayaran.
confirmation.cn: 付款前，团队会确认司机、吉普车、接送点、门票预估和最终价格。
confirmation.us: The team confirms driver, jeep, pickup point, ticket estimate, and final price before payment.

quote.id: Pickup tengah malam terasa lebih aman karena driver sudah update lokasi dan rundown sebelum berangkat.
quote.cn: 午夜接送更安心，因为司机出发前已经更新位置和行程安排。
quote.us: The midnight pickup felt safer because the driver shared the location and rundown before departure.

quote.id: Rute bisa dibuat lebih santai saat ada keluarga yang tidak ingin naik sampai kawah.
quote.cn: 如果家人不想走到火山口，路线可以安排得更轻松。
quote.us: The route can be paced more gently when some family members do not want to climb to the crater.

title.us: Bromo Tour Package from Malang: Route, Price, and Booking Tips

excerpt.id: Panduan singkat untuk memilih paket Bromo dari Malang, mulai dari jam pickup, rute jeep, sampai hal yang perlu dikonfirmasi sebelum bayar.
excerpt.us: A practical guide to choosing a Bromo package from Malang, from pickup timing and jeep routes to what to confirm before payment.

coverAlt.id: Jeep di area Bromo saat perjalanan sunrise
coverAlt.us: Jeep in the Bromo area during a sunrise trip

title.id: Paket Wisata Bromo dari Malang | Harga & Itinerary | Tinggal Jalan
title.us: Bromo Tour Package from Malang | Price & Itinerary | Tinggal Jalan

description.id: Cari paket wisata Bromo dari Malang? Pelajari rute, estimasi harga, jam pickup, fasilitas, dan tips booking private trip Bromo.
description.us: Looking for a Bromo tour package from Malang? Learn routes, price estimates, pickup timing, inclusions, and private trip booking tips.

body.id: Malang sering jadi titik mulai yang nyaman karena jaraknya lebih dekat ke area Bromo dibanding banyak kota besar lain. Untuk sunrise, pickup biasanya dilakukan tengah malam agar masih ada waktu transfer ke jeep dan viewpoint.
body.us: Malang is often a comfortable starting point because it is closer to the Bromo area than many larger cities. For sunrise trips, pickup usually happens around midnight so there is enough time for the jeep transfer and viewpoint stop.

heading.id: Apa yang perlu dicek sebelum booking?
heading.us: What should you check before booking?

body.id: Pastikan titik pickup, tipe jeep, estimasi tiket masuk, durasi stop, dan apakah harga sudah termasuk dokumentasi dasar. Untuk grup keluarga, tanyakan juga opsi rute yang minim jalan kaki.
body.us: Confirm the pickup point, jeep type, entrance ticket estimate, stop duration, and whether basic documentation is included. For family groups, also ask for a route with less walking.

heading.us: When is this route a good fit?

body.id: Rute Bromo dari Malang cocok untuk first timer, traveler yang ingin sunrise klasik, dan grup yang butuh jadwal ringkas. Jika ingin perjalanan lebih santai, pilih paket private agar stop bisa disesuaikan.
body.us: A Bromo route from Malang works well for first timers, travelers chasing the classic sunrise, and groups needing a compact schedule. Choose a private package if you want the stops to stay flexible.

title.id: Tips ke Tumpak Sewu untuk Pemula: Trek, Waktu Terbaik, dan Persiapan
title.us: Tumpak Sewu Tips for First Timers: Trek, Best Time, and Preparation

excerpt.id: Tumpak Sewu indah, tapi aksesnya perlu persiapan. Ini hal yang perlu diketahui sebelum memilih rute panorama atau lower trek.
excerpt.us: Tumpak Sewu is beautiful, but access needs preparation. Here is what to know before choosing the panorama route or lower trek.

title.id: Tips ke Tumpak Sewu untuk Pemula | Tinggal Jalan
title.us: Tumpak Sewu Tips for First Timers | Tinggal Jalan

description.id: Panduan Tumpak Sewu untuk pemula: pilihan rute, persiapan trekking, waktu terbaik, dan tips memilih private trip air terjun.
description.us: A first-timer guide to Tumpak Sewu: route options, trekking preparation, best timing, and tips for choosing a waterfall private trip.

heading.us: Choose the route around your group

body.id: Tidak semua traveler perlu turun sampai area bawah air terjun. Panorama point lebih ringan, sementara lower trek memberi pengalaman lebih dekat tetapi membutuhkan tenaga, sepatu nyaman, dan kesiapan melewati jalur basah.
body.us: Not every traveler needs to descend to the lower waterfall area. The panorama point is easier, while the lower trek feels more immersive but requires energy, proper shoes, and comfort with wet paths.

body.id: Gunakan sandal gunung atau sepatu yang grip-nya kuat, bawa dry bag kecil, dan siapkan pakaian ganti. Hindari membawa barang terlalu banyak karena beberapa jalur cukup sempit.
body.us: Use trekking sandals or shoes with strong grip, bring a small dry bag, and prepare spare clothes. Avoid carrying too much because parts of the trail can be narrow.

body.id: Private trip membuat jam berangkat, ritme trekking, dan kombinasi stop lebih mudah disesuaikan. Ini penting bila grup punya anak, senior, atau traveler yang belum terbiasa trekking.
body.us: A private trip makes departure timing, trekking pace, and stop combinations easier to adjust. This matters for groups with children, seniors, or travelers who are not used to trekking.

heading.id: Hari pertama: adaptasi dan kuliner kota
heading.us: Day one: settle in and taste the city

body.id: Mulai dengan pickup, check-in, lalu rute kota yang ringan. Sore dan malam bisa dipakai untuk kuliner lokal agar traveler tidak langsung lelah setelah perjalanan masuk Jogja.
body.us: Start with pickup, check-in, then a light city route. Late afternoon and evening can focus on local food so travelers do not get tired immediately after arriving in Jogja.

body.id: Hari kedua cocok untuk candi, cerita budaya, dan spot foto. Jika membawa anak atau senior, atur durasi stop lebih pendek dan sisakan waktu istirahat di tengah hari.
body.us: Day two works well for temples, cultural context, and photo stops. If traveling with children or seniors, keep stops shorter and leave rest time in the middle of the day.

heading.id: Hari ketiga: Merapi atau belanja ringan
heading.us: Day three: Merapi or easy shopping

body.id: Sebelum pulang, pilih Merapi Jeep untuk outdoor ringan atau rute belanja oleh-oleh. Pilihan terbaik tergantung jam kereta, penerbangan, dan energi grup.
body.us: Before departure, choose a Merapi Jeep route for light outdoor activity or an easy souvenir stop. The best option depends on train time, flight time, and group energy.

excerpt.id: Lake Toba punya jarak tempuh panjang. Untuk keluarga, itinerary perlu dibuat realistis agar perjalanan tetap menyenangkan.
excerpt.us: Lake Toba involves longer road time. For families, the itinerary should stay realistic so the trip remains enjoyable.

description.id: Tips membuat rute Medan dan Danau Toba lebih nyaman untuk keluarga: durasi perjalanan, stop istirahat, dan pilihan private trip.
description.us: Tips for a more comfortable Medan and Lake Toba family route: road time, rest stops, and private trip options.

heading.id: Jangan terlalu padat di hari pertama
heading.us: Do not overload the first day

body.id: Setelah tiba di Medan, hindari langsung mengisi terlalu banyak stop. Rute menuju Toba butuh waktu, jadi lebih baik memilih beberapa stop yang benar-benar penting.
body.us: After arriving in Medan, avoid packing too many stops immediately. The route toward Toba takes time, so it is better to choose a few stops that truly matter.

heading.id: Atur stop makan dan toilet dengan jelas
heading.us: Plan food and restroom stops clearly

body.id: Untuk keluarga, kenyamanan sering ditentukan oleh stop kecil: makan, toilet, camilan, dan waktu stretching. Komunikasikan kebutuhan ini sejak awal dengan tim trip.
body.us: For families, comfort often depends on small stops: meals, restrooms, snacks, and stretching time. Communicate these needs with the trip team from the start.

heading.us: Use a vehicle with enough room

body.id: Rute Sumatra Utara akan terasa lebih nyaman jika bagasi, stroller, dan ruang kaki sudah dipikirkan. Untuk grup keluarga, upgrade unit sering lebih penting daripada menambah banyak destinasi.
body.us: North Sumatra routes feel more comfortable when luggage, strollers, and legroom are considered. For family groups, a vehicle upgrade is often more valuable than adding extra destinations.

question.en: What is Tinggal Jalan Indonesia Tours?
question.id: Apa itu Tinggal Jalan Indonesia Tours?
question.cn: Tinggal Jalan Indonesia Tours 是什么？

answer.en: We are a travel agency specializing in Bromo and surrounding tours, offering both open and private trips.
answer.id: Kami adalah agen travel yang mengkhususkan wisata Gunung Bromo dan sekitarnya, menawarkan trip open dan private.
answer.cn: 我们是专注于 Bromo 及周边路线的旅行社，提供拼团和私人行程。

question.en: How can I book a trip?

answer.en: You can book via our website, WhatsApp, or direct phone call.
answer.id: Pemesanan dapat dilakukan melalui website kami, WhatsApp, atau telepon langsung.
answer.cn: 你可以通过网站、WhatsApp 或电话提交预订请求。

question.id: Metode pembayaran apa saja yang tersedia?

answer.en: We accept bank transfer, e-wallet, and cash payments for onsite booking.
answer.id: Kami menerima transfer bank, e-wallet, dan pembayaran tunai untuk pemesanan di lokasi.
answer.cn: 确认可用性后，本地旅客使用 IDR/Midtrans，国际旅客使用 USD/Midtrans。

answer.en: Yes, experienced local guides are available in English and Indonesian.
answer.id: Ya, pemandu lokal berpengalaman tersedia dalam bahasa Inggris dan Indonesia.
answer.cn: 是的，我们提供有经验的当地向导，可使用英语和印尼语沟通。

question.en: Is transportation included in the trip?

answer.en: All trips include transportation from the designated meeting point. Additional pickup from outside may have extra charges.
answer.id: Semua trip termasuk transportasi dari meeting point yang ditentukan. Penjemputan dari luar lokasi akan dikenakan biaya tambahan.
answer.cn: 所有行程都包含指定集合点出发的交通。额外接送点可能产生附加费用。

question.en: What should I bring for the trip?
question.id: Apa yang perlu dibawa saat trip?

answer.en: Warm clothing, comfortable shoes, camera, water, and snacks.
answer.id: Pakaian hangat, sepatu nyaman, kamera, air minum, dan cemilan.
answer.cn: 建议携带保暖衣物、舒适鞋子、相机、饮用水和小零食。

question.en: Are the trips suitable for children?

answer.en: Children are welcome but must be accompanied by parents.
answer.id: Anak-anak diperbolehkan, namun harus didampingi orang tua.
answer.cn: 儿童可以参加，但必须由家长陪同。

question.en: How long does a typical trip last?

answer.en: Trips usually take 1 full day, including sunrise, sightseeing, and return.
answer.id: Trip biasanya berlangsung 1 hari penuh, termasuk sunrise, wisata, dan kembali.
answer.cn: 常见行程通常为一整天，包含日出、游览和返回。

question.en: Can I take photos during the trip?
question.id: Apakah diperbolehkan mengambil foto selama trip?

answer.en: Photography is allowed. A photographer may also be included in some packages.
answer.id: Pengambilan foto diperbolehkan. Fotografer juga tersedia di beberapa paket.
answer.cn: 可以拍照。部分套餐也可以安排摄影服务。

question.en: How can I leave a review or testimonial?
question.id: Bagaimana cara memberikan ulasan atau testimoni?

answer.en: You can leave a review on our Google Business page or via our website’s review section.
answer.id: Anda dapat memberikan ulasan di halaman Google Bisnis kami atau melalui bagian ulasan di website.
answer.cn: 你可以在 Google Business 页面或网站评价区域留下反馈。

question.en: What is the difference between Open Trip and Private Trip?
question.id: Apa perbedaan Open Trip dan Private Trip?
question.cn: 拼团和私人行程有什么区别？

answer.en:
Open Trip: shared tour with other travelers, lower cost per person, fixed schedule.
Private Trip: exclusive tour for your group, flexible schedule, more privacy.
answer.id:
Open Trip: Trip bersama peserta lain, biaya per orang lebih murah, jadwal tetap.
Private Trip: Trip eksklusif untuk grup Anda, jadwal fleksibel, lebih privat.
answer.cn:
拼团：与其他旅客同行，人均费用更低，时间固定。
私人行程：只服务你的团队，时间更灵活，也更私密。

question.en: Can I convert my Open Trip booking to a Private Trip?
question.id: Apakah saya bisa mengubah pemesanan Open Trip menjadi Private Trip?
question.cn: 可以把拼团改成私人行程吗？

answer.en: Yes, subject to availability and additional charges. Please contact us directly to arrange.
answer.id: Ya, tergantung ketersediaan dan biaya tambahan. Silakan hubungi kami langsung untuk pengaturan.
answer.cn: 可以，但取决于可用性并可能产生额外费用。请直接联系我们安排。
